name: Stardust Metal Corp.
description: Stardust Metal Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of gold and copper assets in Ontario and Quebec, Canada. The company holds a diverse portfolio of projects, including key assets in the Kirkland Lake district and the Shebandowan gold district, as well as copper properties in Chibougamau. Additionally, Stardust maintains strategic investments in other mining ventures. By targeting high-potential mineral properties, the company aims to advance its exploration projects toward resource definition and increase shareholder value through the development of precious and base metal deposits.
